# Checklist: Requirements Quality
<!-- Generated by /speckit.checklist -->
<!-- Branch: main | Date: 2026-04-06 -->

## Existing Requirements

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK001 | FR-001: "cents (i32)" — spec says i32 but CLR-001 decided to migrate debt amounts remain i32, only timestamp changes. Confirm i32 is still correct for debt.amount | [consistency] | FR-001, CLR-001 | [ ] |
| CHK002 | FR-002: Fair remainder algorithm — spec describes behavior but lacks concrete example with expected output (e.g., "100 split 3 ways = 34, 33, 33") | [testability] | FR-002 | [ ] |
| CHK003 | FR-004: "Group membership required for all group data access" — does this include the join endpoint (POST /group/{id}/member)? A non-member must call it to join. Clarify exception. | [completeness] | FR-004, US5 | [ ] |
| CHK004 | FR-006: "no expiration validation" — CLR-002 confirms intentional. Verify spec and code agree (validate_exp = false in authentication.rs) | [consistency] | FR-006, CLR-002 | [ ] |
| CHK005 | FR-012: Net debt calculation formula — spec says "credits from others minus debts to others per counterparty" but lacks edge case: what if user is both creditor AND debtor in same transaction? | [completeness] | FR-012 | [ ] |
| CHK006 | FR-013: Amount normalization — "pads to cents format" is vague. What does "5" become? "0.05" or "5.00"? Testable examples needed. | [testability] | FR-013 | [ ] |
| CHK007 | US1: Password minimum "8 chars" — is this enforced backend or frontend only? Spec doesn't specify where validation occurs. | [completeness] | US1, FR-005 | [ ] |
| CHK008 | US5: Join group — what happens if user is already a member? Spec doesn't define this edge case. | [completeness] | US5 | [ ] |
| CHK009 | US6: "amount is split among selected consumers" — are consumers always ALL group members or a subset? Spec says "select consumers" but doesn't clarify if creditor can be excluded. | [clarity] | US6, FR-002 | [ ] |
| CHK010 | US10: "New/Active badges" — what determines "New" vs "Active"? Spec says based on updated_at === created_at but doesn't make this explicit as a requirement. | [clarity] | US10, FR-015 | [ ] |

## New Features (from Clarifications)

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK011 | CLR-003: Transaction editing — no new US# or FR-NNN was added to the spec for this feature. The spec needs a US15 and FR-025+ for transaction update. | [completeness] | CLR-003 | [ ] |
| CHK012 | CLR-003: Transaction update — what fields are editable? Amount, description, debtors — but can the creditor change? Can the timestamp change? Plan says timestamp is optional in update request but spec doesn't constrain this. | [completeness] | CLR-003 | [ ] |
| CHK013 | CLR-003: Transaction update — "delete old debts, recreate" — is this atomic? What if the app crashes mid-update? Should this be wrapped in a DB transaction? | [feasibility] | CLR-003 | [ ] |
| CHK014 | CLR-004: Group deletion — no new US# or FR-NNN in spec. Needs US16 and FR for "only owner can delete group." | [completeness] | CLR-004 | [ ] |
| CHK015 | CLR-004: Group deletion — what happens to users who have the deleted group in their list? Frontend should handle 404 gracefully when navigating to a deleted group. | [completeness] | CLR-004 | [ ] |
| CHK016 | CLR-005: Profile editing — no new US# or FR-NNN in spec. Needs US17 and FRs for nickname/password update. | [completeness] | CLR-005 | [ ] |
| CHK017 | CLR-005: Profile editing — if nickname changes, does it affect displayed names in existing transactions/debts? Or are names resolved at display time from user.nickname? | [consistency] | CLR-005 | [ ] |
| CHK018 | CLR-006: PostgreSQL migration — data migration script (T026) lacks acceptance criteria. What constitutes success? Row counts match? Checksums? | [testability] | CLR-006 | [ ] |
| CHK019 | CLR-001: Timestamp migration — what happens to existing transactions with i32 timestamps when the column becomes i64? Are all values preserved exactly? Test criteria needed. | [testability] | CLR-001, FR-024 | [ ] |
| CHK020 | CLR-004: Group deletion confirmation — plan says "show group name + transaction count" but this is a UI decision not in the spec. Should the confirmation text be specified? | [clarity] | CLR-004 | [ ] |
